details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: Invoice bundle for Claudia
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification: attachments were all previously read, ordered newest-first among selected oldest-three set, recipient matches canonical Miles entity, no quoted-source fidelity requirement beyond concise body, YAML special-character safety acceptable. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task fully executed: processed next inbox note, verified identity/authority, resolved Claudia-linked invoices, created outbound draft, and removed processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and prepared a reply draft with the requested invoice bundle. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md` addressed to miles@novak.example with attachments for the three oldest Claudia-linked invoices (listed in required newest-first attachment order): 2026-02-17 INV-0008, 2026-01-19 INV-0007, 2025-12-18 INV-0006. Then deleted the processed inbox note `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> root AGENTS.MD -> context), inspected 99_system and relevant inbox/email workflows, validated sender against canonical entity primary_contact_email, used canonical entity context to locate finance records, drafted outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox with required schema, enforced newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked for oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia. Sender `miles@novak.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/miles.md`. Claudia linkage was confirmed in three invoice files via `related_entity | Claudia Reiter` and issue dates: 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, 2026-02-17. Outbound draft was created with those files attached and inbox item removed per workflow.
